_instructions: Add your work experience here. Copy the experience object for each job.

experiences.title: Data Engineer
responsibilities: Developed end-to-end revenue analytics platform using Fivetran for automated data ingestion from Billing Platform APIs and Emburse products, dbt with Medallion architecture, and Snowflake multi-region warehousing
Implemented data consolidation across 3 Snowflake regions to enable precise usage metering, supporting less than 1% discrepancy in billing reconciliation
Developed dbt models with incremental logic, snapshots for SCD tracking, and reusable KPIs via Metrics package
Implemented the dbt Semantic Layer, defining semantic models, measures, and dimensions for core revenue and usage KPIs
Orchestrated end-to-end ELT pipelines with Airflow (MWAA), automating Fivetran ingestion, dbt transformations, and Python reports
Leveraged Snowflake Dynamic Tables for frequent meter updates, improving data freshness and reducing pipeline overhead
Developed a Streamlit application as a lightweight Master Data Management tool, enabling business users to manage and validate master data directly in Snowflake
Built Python scripts that generated detailed customer usage reports and reconciled Billing Platform data with Snowflake-calculated metrics

experiences.title: Snowflake Data Engineer
responsibilities: Developed scalable ELT pipelines using Fivetran and DBT, centralizing financial and asset data in Snowflake as a governed Single Source of Truth
Designed Snowflake ingestion patterns using Snowpipe with auto-ingest via S3 and Azure Blob Storage event notifications for near real-time data delivery
Implemented Streams & Tasks framework to build incremental ELT flows, automating transformations and ensuring continuous propagation of changes
Designed complex SQL transformations and reusable DBT macros with Jinja, reducing code redundancy
Spearheaded cost governance and performance tuning using Snowflake's Query Profiler and dynamic warehouse management, cutting operational spend by 20%
Utilized Zero-Copy Cloning for rapid provisioning of test environments, accelerating feature development
Integrated DBT's generic data testing framework and built DBT snapshots for SCD Type 2 dimension tracking
Streamlined development with Git-based CI/CD pipelines; mentored new engineers on Snowflake architecture and modern data stack best practices

experiences.title: Associate Data Engineer
responsibilities: Designed a Customer 360 Data Platform in Snowflake, consolidating 100M+ customer records from 10+ sources using DBT and Fivetran for personalized marketing analytics
Built incremental DBT models to unify customer profiles, transforming 5TB of data and reducing processing time by 40%
Optimized Snowflake query performance using clustering keys and dynamic warehouses, ensuring scalable analytics
Orchestrated ELT pipelines with Apache Airflow, scheduling daily DBT runs and monitoring Fivetran syncs, improving customer segmentation accuracy by 20%
Integrated social media APIs into Snowflake to support Marketing Mix Modeling and spend analytics
Automated ETL workflows using Airflow with Python Snowflake connectors and optimized API consumption via dynamic pagination
Developed aggregated data models to support spend analysis, improving marketing ROI by 15%
